texto: I have a 4-year-old and a 14-year-old, and think I missed a recital and a graduation, and they were like 'It's OK mommy, we'll take pictures.' It was my upset, though... they were just fine! I just give them a kiss and a hug and let them know that I love them every day.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kimberly Quinn: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I have a 4-year-old and a 14-year-old, and think I missed a recital and a graduation, and they we…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, love, day pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de formatura e day.

frase_original: I have a 4-year-old and a 14-year-old, and think I missed a recital and a graduation, and they were like 'It's OK mommy, we'll take pictures.' It was my upset, though... they were just fine! I just give them a kiss and a hug and let them know that I love them every day.
